'''Creed Mitsun''' was the foreman of [[Orbital Shipyard 1321]].

==Biography==
His crew was working on the ''[[Amerce]]'', a new [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] built to combat the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He had been dating an exotic dancer from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] for two years in [[Fondor City]] at the time of the [[Battle of Fondor]]. Mitsun and many of his crew were [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the ''Amerce'' and her slipway were destroyed by [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] [[ramship]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
